We welcome walk-ins all day but encourage reservations for a smoother experience.

Click the reservation icon to secure your spot!

Click here

Welcome!

The Vibe is where brunch meets creativity and flavor in the heart of Normal Heights, San Diego! Our menu? It’s like a breakfast party where classics high-five inventive dishes, and your taste buds wake up like, “Whoa, what’s cooking here?”

Read More

Our Menu

Our menu reimagines breakfast classics with a modern twist, from fluffy buttermilk pancakes adorned with seasonal fruit to inventive dishes like the “Benni Burro,” where smoked salmon and a perfectly runny egg unite on a toasted English muffin.

Whether you’re indulging in our culinary creations or sipping handcrafted coffee from our barista bar, The Vibe promises a brunch experience that delights the senses and sets the tone for an exceptional day ahead.
View Menu

Open 8am-2pm Wekdays, 8am-3pm Weekend

3250 Adams Ave, San Diego, CA 92116

+1 619-901-2281

info@thevibeco.com
